data.name: 冒险的路上总在为爱鼓掌 Adventure road
data.detailed_description:
遊戲附帶全CG存檔，享受暢玩體驗~

遊戲中的所有素材均為正版授權

劇情概要：


哈里斯是一名優秀的賞金獵人。
他在冒險者工會接到了一個尋找失踪少女的委託，從而踏上了冒險之路，
來到哈加爾鎮遇到了嬌羞可愛的鄰家女孩安娜，兩人產生了情愫。
之後在招募隊友的時候遇到了同時在尋找隊友的體力旺盛的痴女戰士“阿朵妮”，
還有鬼畜又喜歡刺激的女忍者“神樂”，你與她們一同參與冒險，並逐漸的走入她們的內~心~
從此在冒險的路上充滿了愛的掌聲——

角色介紹：


安娜：

外表看起來容易害羞，是個專情又可愛的女孩~

阿朵妮：

總是精力旺盛的樣子，但一些特定的情況下也會害羞呢~

神樂：

看起來很高冷的樣子，其實私下熱情似火，不讓雞兒放假~

遊戲特色：

  • 隨著主角一起去冒險，並在途中收穫愛意。
  • 容易上手富含策略的回合製戰鬥。
  • 各具特色的職業與獨特的技能，每個職業都擁有強力的必殺技。
  • 通過走位躲避的怪物，相對自由的選擇戰鬥。
  • 裝備合成系統，讓遊戲體驗更加有趣。

發行商Miss Banana，現已更名為Hera Games。感謝大家的支持哦！

data.short_description: 賞金獵人“哈里斯”接到了一個委託，來到一個陌生的小鎮，在這裡他邂逅了嬌羞可愛的鄰家女孩“安娜”，體力旺盛的痴女戰士“阿朵妮”，還有鬼畜又喜歡刺激的女忍者“神樂”，你與她們一同參與冒險，並逐漸的走入她們的內~心~
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 簡體中文*, 英文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡:
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統:
  • 處理器:
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡:
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡:

data.name: 冒险的路上总在为爱鼓掌 Adventure road
data.detailed_description:
The game comes with a full CG archive for an enjoyable gaming experience.

All game materials are officially authorized.

Plot Summary:


"Harris" is an outstanding bounty hunter.
He received a mission from the Adventurer's Guild to find a missing girl, thus embarking on an adventure. In Hagar Town, he met the shy and lovely girl-next-door "Anna," and the two developed feelings for each other. Later, while recruiting teammates, he encountered the energetic and passionate female warrior "Adoni," who was also looking for teammates. Additionally, he met the sadistic and thrill-seeking female ninja "Kagura." You join them in their adventure and gradually delve into their hearts.
From then on, the adventure is filled with the applause of love.

Character Introduction:


Anna：

She appears shy at first glance but is a devoted and lovely girl.

Adoni：

Always energetic, but she can be shy in certain situations.

Kagura：

She seems aloof, but in private, she's as passionate as fire and never lets up.

Game Features:

  • Embark on an adventure with the protagonist and find love along the way.
  • Easy-to-learn, strategy-rich turn-based combat.
  • Distinctive classes and unique skills, with each class possessing powerful ultimate abilities.
  • Avoid monsters through positioning and enjoy relatively free battle choices.
  • An equipment synthesis system makes the gaming experience even more interesting.

Publisher Miss Banana has now been renamed Hera Games. Thank you for your support!

data.short_description: Bounty hunter "Harris" takes on a mission and arrives in a strange town where he encounters the shy and lovely girl-next-door "Anna," the energetic and passionate female warrior "Adoni," and ninja "Kagura." You join them in their adventure and gradually delve into their hearts.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese*, English, Japanese
*languages with full audio support

  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 800 MB available space
  • Sound Card:
